title: $clog2 returns an unsigned type while the spec says it should be signed

features.name: clog2 result type signedness
features.description: Code should include a $clog2 function call used in an arithmetic expression where unsigned result causes underflow when compared against signed values
features.snippet:
localparam integer X = $clog2(1 << 17) - 18;
wire [31:0] result = (X > 0) ? X : 0;

features.name: clog2 subtraction with negative result
features.description: Code should include a subtraction expression where $clog2 result minus a constant should produce a negative value but unsigned arithmetic causes underflow

features.name: mixed signed unsigned comparison with clog2
features.description: Code should include a comparison between $clog2 expression result and a signed literal where unsigned underflow causes incorrect branch selection in ternary or if
